TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qaljecim, title = Qaljecim, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qaljecim} }

S.FORM: alang Qaljecim ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 334 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 329 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qaljecim hya' ga Tjusinlung. tay mkyahu' na Qaljecim hya' ga Kaidi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qaljecim ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 334 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 329 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qaljecim hya' ga Tjusinlung. tay mkyahu' na Qaljecim hya' ga Kaidi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qaljeʦ~ʨim ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na qaljeʦ~ʨim ħjaʔ ɣa tjus~ɕinluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qaljeʦ~ʨim ħjaʔ ɣa kai*i. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
